assistant.todaySubtitle: 10 second re dekhi nebantu — aaji kana hela, kana miss hela, ebam ebe kana kariba.
assistant.missedReachBody: Kalhi apana praya {reach} loka ku adhika reach kari paruthante.
assistant.revenueEstimateBody: Ei post ru dharantu praya ₹{low}–₹{high} extra sale asipare (sadharana andaaja).
assistant.bestTimeCtaLater: Ei time pain post schedule karantu
assistant.noData: Data ready nahin. Prathame Instagram connect karantu kimba sync sesha heba paryanta apyekhya karantu.
assistant.aiRecommendationEmpty: Thoda adhika data asile ame apana pain easy next step dekhai debu.
assistant.listenUnavailable: Ei device re awaaz support nahin.
assistant.shareCopied: Summary copy hela. WhatsApp ba Instagram re paste karantu.
assistant.microPraiseGeneric: Bhala decision. Ei kama reach badhai pariba.
assistant.microPraiseCaption: Bhala. Nua caption idea asile adhika engagement asiba.
assistant.microPraisePost: Strong move. Ebe post karile lokanka mind re rahibe.
assistant.microPraiseReply: Thik achhi. Jhatpat reply customer bani deithae.
